summary: Web app with authentication flow using Internet Identity. Issues found: Register Step 2 has 'Connecting...' stuck state and 'Authentication cancelled or failed' error; Login page buttons (Google/Apple/Microsoft/Passkey) are not clickable. Fix: replace custom auth buttons with Internet Identity default popup on both pages.
architectural_notes: Authentication uses Internet Identity (II) default popup instead of custom Google/Apple/Microsoft/Passkey buttons
known_issues: Register Step 2: 'Connecting...' stuck state and 'Authentication cancelled or failed' error
Login page: Google/Apple/Microsoft/Passkey buttons not clickable

existing_features.title: On RegisterPage Step 2 ('Authenticate' step), remove the current custom authentication buttons and the stuck 'Connecting...' state. Replace with a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button that directly calls the `login()` function from `useInternetIdentity` hook without any custom method selection logic. Clear any stuck loading state on mount so the button is always clickable when the user arrives at Step 2. Remove the 'Authentication cancelled or failed. Please try again.' error that persists from a previous failed attempt.

On LoginPage, remove the AuthMethodButtons component (Google, Apple, Microsoft, Passkey separate buttons) and the 'CHOOSE METHOD' UI. Replace with a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button that directly calls the `login()` function from `useInternetIdentity` hook. The button must be fully clickable and functional — no disabled or non-interactive state on initial render.
